## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem would this solve for you or other users?

## Proposed Approach

Describe your preferred solution, if you have one.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches or workarounds you considered.

## Additional Context

Add supporting examples, references, or screenshots here.
